DB Query Guard MCP

Paid remote MCP for governed database query review, SQL simulation, approvals, and audits.

Website: https://dbqueryguard.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://dbqueryguard.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://dbqueryguard.clauxel.com/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json
Registry name: com.clauxel.dbqueryguard/dbqueryguard-mcp
Auth: Authorization: Bearer <token> after checkout and token claim.
Boundary: read-only fixed tools for database query governance; no arbitrary shell, arbitrary SQL, deployment, deletion, or payment configuration tools.
